case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. RICHARD BURNS et al

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BURNS, RICHARD $4,250.80 PRINCIPAL, $240.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,491.30, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
